author: y4rr
content: Aggregated audit written to audits/2026-05-02-rust-quality-and-gpu-discipline.md (~16k words). 22/22 subagents returned, both skills loaded successfully on every one (empirical confirmation that general-purpose sonnet subagents can invoke Skills). Workspace severity tally: 75 red / 117 yellow / 47 green findings. Two systemic gaps dominate: (1) zero lint configuration anywhere in the workspace, (2) silent CPU host-readback under GPU-flavored names in 7 crates. Top discrete bugs: ferrotorch-hub path traversal via server-controlled shard filenames; ferrotorch-serialize GGUF parser pre-auth DoS via attacker-controlled Vec::with_capacity; ferrotorch-mps init_mps_backend lying-success stub; ferrotorch (umbrella) tests/gpu_training.rs is a fake-GPU test file; ferrotorch-jit InductorTarget::GpuCuda silently falls through to CPU interpreter. Not committing changes — audit is read-only artifact for joint evaluation.
